cinematography.camera_motion: static tripod shot positioned slightly behind and above the subject
cinematography.lens_and_focus: medium shot, sharp focus on the subject's back and the glowing monitors, shallow depth of field blurring the room slightly

simulation.motion_blur: natural motion blur on hand movements

subject.identity: young woman with vibrant blue dyed hair tied in a loose bun or ponytail, wearing a casual oversized pastel t-shirt or hoodie

appearance.texture: realistic hair strands catching the glow from the screens, soft fabric folds on clothing
appearance.physics: natural subtle movements as she breathes and uses the mouse/keyboard

movement_timeline.action: Subject is seated in an ergonomic gaming chair, seen from behind. She is actively clicking and typing, engrossed in the screens.

environment.location: dimly lit bedroom or gaming setup, modern and cozy aesthetic
environment.background_dynamics: PC case with glowing bright RGB ring fans visible to the side, soft ring lights or key lights illuminating the scene from the front

lighting.type: dramatic contrasting light: bright, cool-toned glow emitting from the dual monitors illuminating the subject's silhouette and hair, contrasted with the darker ambient room lighting
lighting.changes_over_time: screens cast a steady, bright glow

environment.details: Two large monitors display cryptic, text-heavy websites with dark themes and glowing green accents, resembling complex puzzles, decoding interfaces, or hacker-style enigma sites.

temporal_consistency: Subject's hair color and style do not morph or change
No spontaneous appearance of objects on the desk
